multilingual.quote: "Your customer speaks Spanish. Your systems speak English. Greentic connects both."

items.title: Chat with your network
items.description: Let engineers ask AI to find the root cause of network issues — across logs, alarms, and topology — in seconds, not hours.

items.title: Self-service that sells
items.description: Customers browse, ask questions, and buy — all through an AI assistant that knows your catalog, pricing, and policies.

items.title: Automate complex setup
items.description: Provision environments, configure networks, and onboard tenants — repetitive infrastructure tasks, fully automated.

items.title: Eliminate repetitive work
items.description: Every business has boring, repetitive tasks. Greentic turns them into reliable, automated workflows — no matter the industry.

platform.title: Platform
platform.subtitle: Explore how Greentic builds from atomic components to fully autonomous Digital Workers

steps.label: Component
steps.headline: It starts with a Component
steps.description: A Component is the atomic building block. It connects directly to one of your core systems — CRM, ERP, ticketing, databases, APIs — via MCP and OAuth.

steps.label: Flow
steps.headline: Components join into a Flow
steps.description: Multiple Components get wired together in a deterministic Flow. Flows orchestrate the order of execution — ensuring consistency, auditability, and control.

steps.label: Application Pack
steps.headline: Flows become an Application Pack
steps.description: Multiple Flows and Components get packaged into an Application Pack — a complete automation for a specific business process like customer onboarding or order management.

steps.label: Bundle = Digital Worker
steps.headline: Bundles create a Digital Worker
steps.description: Application Packs and Extension Packs get bundled into a Bundle — your Digital Worker. It gets deployed, runs autonomously, and handles an entire domain of work.

comparison.title: How Greentic is
comparison.subtitle: Not another chatbot framework. Greentic automates real business processes with full control.

greentic.title: Greentic
greentic.subtitle: AI automation platform
how: AI used where needed, not everywhere

items.title: Customer Self-Service
items.output: Order placed, account updated, issue resolved

howItWorks.title: Enterprise-ready
howItWorks.subtitle: Automate real business processes across messaging, events, and systems — with full control, auditability, and multilingual support.

features.title: Engage customers everywhere
features.description: Support Microsoft Teams, Slack, WhatsApp, Webex, website chat, and more — messaging channels become entry points for business processes.

features.title: Trigger workflows from anywhere
features.description: Webhooks, scheduled jobs, SMS, external system events, and API triggers — real-time and event-driven automation at scale.

features.title: Controlled execution, every time
features.description: Explicit workflow steps with predictable execution paths. Deterministic by design — no unpredictable agent behaviour. Built for business-critical processes.

features.title: Connect to real business systems
features.description: MCP-based integrations, APIs, OpenAPI services, CRM, ERP, and internal systems — secured via OAuth. AI doesn't just answer — it acts.

features.title: AI where it adds value
features.description: Natural language understanding, content generation, classification, and routing — all within controlled workflows. AI is optional — control is mandatory.

features.title: Rich user interactions
features.description: Adaptive Cards, structured responses, and guided workflows with multi-channel UI consistency — delivering polished experiences everywhere.

features.title: Governance built in
features.description: Policy enforcement, routing rules, access control, and business logic constraints. Ensure the right actions happen, every time.

features.title: Full visibility and auditability
features.description: Execution tracking, audit logs, monitoring, and analytics hooks. Every action is observable and traceable.

features.title: Global from day one
features.description: 50+ languages supported with input and output in any language. Consistent workflows, localised customer experiences. One workflow. Every language.

pillars.title: Secure Access
pillars.sub: OAuth-based authentication for every integration. Enterprise-grade from day one.

pillars.title: Deterministic Execution
pillars.sub: Workflows execute exactly as defined. Predictable, testable, auditable.

pillars.title: Observability
pillars.sub: Full visibility into every workflow execution. Trace, debug, and monitor in real time.

pillars.title: MCP-based Integration
pillars.sub: Standard protocol for connecting AI to any system. No custom adapters needed.
